retry_reason: kref_init always succeeds unconditionally; no failure path exists, so retry is meaningless.
contract_summary: This is a set-wrapper that initializes a newly allocated i915_refct_sgt structure. It sets the embedded kref to 1 (establishing the initial reference), clears the scatterlist pointer, and stores the size and operations. The caller must later release the reference by calling an appropriate put function (e.g., i915_refct_sgt_put) when the structure is no longer needed. This function represents the creation/birth step of the reference-counted object's lifecycle.
